clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: LES hypotension and transient LES relaxations are the primary pathophysiological mechanisms of GERD

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Failed LES relaxation due to myenteric plexus degeneration defines achalasia

clinical.reason: LES dysfunction manifests as dysphagia — understanding physiology explains symptom mechanisms

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Fundoplication augments the LES anti-reflux barrier by wrapping gastric fundus around the GEJ

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Myotomy disrupts hypertensive LES in achalasia — directly targets LES pathology
